chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 33 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 10.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitoiner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Zulfiqar Ali SHO PS Dad Leghari, ASI Ghulam Sarwar, ASI Noor Illahi, Ghulam Yaseen and Amjad Ali >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6 & 7, same is taken on record. It appears that there is some litigation pending between the parties. The official respondents present in Court file statement and submit that they will provide protection to the petitioner and his family members as and when they approach accordingly. Learned AAG Sindh also states that the police is duty bound to act in accordance with the law and provide protection to the citizens of this country. Counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the above statements seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of with direction to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with the law and provide protection to the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
